methods.Destroy:
IF USED("curdias")
		USE IN ("curdias")
	ENDIF
	CLEAR EVENTS
methods.Gerar:
LOCAL d, fim, dow
	IF USED("curdias")
		USE IN ("curdias")
	ENDIF
	CREATE CURSOR curdias (dia D, semana C(13), util L)
	d = This.txtIni.value
	fim = This.txtFim.value
	DO WHILE d <= fim
		dow = DOW(d, 1)
		INSERT INTO curdias (dia, semana, util) VALUES (d, This.NomeDia(dow), This.ehDiaUtil(dow))
		d = (d + 1)
	ENDDO
	This.grdDias.recordSource = "curdias"
methods.Init:
SET DATE DMY
	SET CENTURY ON
	This.txtIni.value = DATE()
	This.txtFim.value = (DATE() + 13)
	This.Gerar()
methods.NomeDia:
LPARAMETERS tnDow
	IF tnDow = 1
		RETURN "Domingo"
	ENDIF
	IF tnDow = 2
		RETURN "Segunda-feira"
	ENDIF
	IF tnDow = 3
		RETURN "Terca-feira"
	ENDIF
	IF tnDow = 4
		RETURN "Quarta-feira"
	ENDIF
	IF tnDow = 5
		RETURN "Quinta-feira"
	ENDIF
	IF tnDow = 6
		RETURN "Sexta-feira"
	ENDIF
	RETURN "Sabado"
methods.ehDiaUtil:
LPARAMETERS tnDow
	RETURN IIF(tnDow != 1 AND tnDow != 7, .T., .F.)
